content:
FINAL END-TO-END AUDIT + COMPLETE DEPLOYMENT FIX

Repository:
ibb142/rork-ivxholding--1

Stop adding new app features.
Focus only on completing the deployment pipeline.

Current blocker:
GitHub has newer code, but Render production is still running old commit.
Auto-deploy is not triggering.

MISSION:
Audit end-to-end, fix the Render/GitHub deployment connection, deploy latest code, and prove production is current.

1. FULL GITHUB AUDIT

Return:
REPO:
BRANCH:
LATEST_GITHUB_SHA:
LATEST_10_COMMITS:
GITHUB_ACTIONS:
RENDER_API_KEY_SECRET_EXISTS:
RENDER_SERVICE_ID_SECRET_EXISTS:
WEBHOOKS_CONFIGURED:
PUSH_STATUS:

2. FULL RENDER AUDIT

Return:
RENDER_SERVICE:
RENDER_SERVICE_ID:
CONNECTED_REPO:
CONNECTED_BRANCH:
AUTO_DEPLOY_ENABLED:
LATEST_RENDER_DEPLOY_ID:
LATEST_RENDER_DEPLOY_STATUS:
RENDER_DEPLOYED_SHA:
RENDER_DEPLOY_LOGS:

3. FIX AUTO-DEPLOY

If Render is connected to wrong repo:
- Connect to ibb142/rork-ivxholding--1
- Branch main
- Enable auto-deploy

If GitHub secrets are missing:
- Add required secrets:
  RENDER_API_KEY
  RENDER_SERVICE_ID

If webhook is missing:
- Create GitHub webhook or Render deploy hook.

4. FORCE DEPLOY NOW

Trigger deployment manually from latest GitHub main.

Wait until complete.

Return:
DEPLOY_ID:
DEPLOY_STATUS:
DEPLOYED_SHA:
DEPLOY_TIME:

5. VERIFY PRODUCTION

Test:
- GET /health
- GET /version
- chat.ivxholding.com
- public chat send/reply
- owner chat
- last conversation auto-open
- message persistence
- Supabase connection

6. COMMIT MATCH

Compare:
LATEST_GITHUB_SHA
RENDER_DEPLOYED_SHA
HEALTH_SHA

Return:
COMMIT_MATCH: YES/NO

7. FINAL OUTPUT ONLY

GITHUB_SHA:
RENDER_DEPLOY_ID:
RENDER_DEPLOYED_SHA:
HEALTH_SHA:
COMMIT_MATCH:
AUTO_DEPLOY_STATUS:
HEALTH_STATUS:
FRONTEND_STATUS:
CHAT_STATUS:
SUPABASE_STATUS:
LAST_CONVERSATION_STATUS:
ERRORS:
BLOCKERS:
FINAL_STATUS:

Rules:
COMPLETE only if:
GitHub SHA = Render SHA = /health SHA
and auto-deploy works.
